raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of Housing and Community Development has awarded over $3 million from the Transitional Housing Program to support housing stability for young adults.",
    "The Transitional Housing Program promotes housing stability for young adults aged 18 to 25, prioritizing those formerly in the foster care or probation systems.",
    "The Housing Navigators Program provides funding to counties for housing navigators to help young adults aged 18 to 21 secure housing.",
    "The County of Los Angeles was awarded $2,753,600 from the Transitional Housing Program.",
    "The County of Riverside was awarded $257,600 from the Transitional Housing Program.",
    "The County of San Bernardino was awarded $297,600 from the Transitional Housing Program.",
    "The County of Los Angeles was awarded $1,720,985 from the Housing Navigators Program.",
    "The County of Riverside was awarded $223,940 from the Housing Navigators Program.",
    "The County of San Bernardino was awarded $363,680 from the Housing Navigators Program."
  ]
}
```
